text: Powdery mildew appears as white powdery spots on leaves. Improve airflow, avoid overhead watering, and use sulfur or potassium bicarbonate fungicides.
Early blight in tomato causes brown concentric rings on lower leaves. Remove infected leaves, rotate crops, and apply copper-based fungicides.
Leaf spot diseases often spread in humid conditions. Keep foliage dry, space plants, and sanitize tools between plants.
Overwatering can mimic disease symptoms like yellowing and drooping. Check root rot and improve soil drainage.
